testcase.name: test_respond_success_as_creator
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_reevaluation.py:64: in test_respond_success_as_creator assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 400: {"detail":"Só é possível responder a conteúdos rejeitados"} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_respond_verifies_response_saved
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_reevaluation.py:77: in test_respond_verifies_response_saved assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code
